creator: fraph24@gmail.com
text:
There are about 60 links broken on that page, according to https://validator.w3.org/checklink?uri=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.freebsd.org%2Fit%2Fwhere.html&hide_type=all&depth=&check=Check

It would be great to have some kind of automatic check in place to avoid this kind of situation in the future.
